topics.title: Bias–variance tradeoff
topics.summary: How model complexity affects squared error through bias and variance, and the irreducible noise floor.

topics.title: Linear regression basics
topics.summary: Least-squares line fitting, normal equations, and geometric intuition for prediction error.

topics.title: Multimodal Secure Alignment
topics.summary: The challenge of ensuring safety guardrails hold robustly across fundamentally different data modalities (text, images, audio) when projected into a shared embedding space, preventing cross-modal jailbreaks that bypass text filters.

topics.title: ZeRO (Zero Redundancy Optimizer)
topics.summary: A memory-optimization technique for distributed deep learning that eliminates redundant storage of optimizer states, gradients, and parameters across data-parallel GPUs, enabling training of models with trillions of parameters without re…

topics.title: T5 (Text-to-Text Transfer Transformer)
topics.summary: A unified encoder-decoder Transformer framework that casts every NLP language problem — translation, answering, classification, regression — into a text-to-text format, allowing the same objective to be trained across all tasks.

topics.title: GPT-2 & Zero-Shot Task Transfer
topics.summary: A 1.5-billion-parameter autoregressive Transformer language model that demonstrated tasks can be performed zero-shot — without any fine-tuning — purely by prompting the model to complete sequences.

topics.title: GPT-1 (Generative Pre-Training)
topics.summary: The first model to demonstrate the generative "pre-train then fine-tune" paradigm for transformers: a decoder trained purely on language modeling unlabeled text, which is then fine-tuned on downstream data with minimal added layers.

topics.title: ELMo (Embeddings from Language Models)
topics.summary: An influential technique that produces deep contextualized word embeddings by taking a learned linear combination of the internal hidden states of a pre-trained bidirectional LSTM language model.

topics.title: Sparsely-Gated Mixture of Experts (MoE)

topics.title: Key-Value Memory Networks
topics.summary: An influential evolution in Memory Networks that rigorously decouples the memory addressing mechanism (keys) from the memory payload returned (values), directly inspiring modern QKV attention mechanism formulations.

topics.title: GloVe Word Embeddings
topics.summary: An influential foundational word embedding paradigm optimizing directly over factorizing a full global document word-word co-occurrence matrix, achieving spectacular mathematical linearity across syntactic semantic analogies uniformly.
